abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} using your knowledge of tracking, woodcraft, or woodland creatures, add +1.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by hiding or sneaking in the woodlands, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.LzbHBsqjqOWtSmnX]{Make Camp} in the woodlands, you may roll +wits (instead of +supply). If you do, you and your allies each choose 1 more option on a hit.
